cases.prompt: Control Microsoft 365 group and Teams sprawl with lifecycle policies.

expect.label: Governance underpins Copilot readiness - uncontrolled sharing means Copilot oversharing
Balance control with productivity; over-restriction drives shadow IT
Use access reviews to remove stale guest and broad access continuously
Tighten defaults (group creation, naming, expiration, default sharing link)

cases.prompt: How do I prepare Microsoft 365 governance for a Copilot rollout?

expect.label: Discover first - run SAM Data Access Governance reports to quantify sprawl
Tighten defaults before cleaning up so sprawl does not regrow
Apply container sensitivity labels at site/team/group level
Anti-pattern: do not block all group creation - drives shadow IT

cases.prompt: What is the right default sharing link for a tenant?

expect.label: Default sharing link should be People in your organisation, not Anyone with the link
External sharing scoped to existing guests or new and existing guests, not Anyone
